'''dhapogo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:qiyam|qiyam]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| dh-p-g
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:qiyam|qiyam]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| dhapogo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:dhæpegeth|dhæpegeth]] || [[word:dhæpegej|dhæpegej]] || [[word:dhæpegesh|dhæpegesh]] || [[word:dhæpege|dhæpege]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:dhapopogoth|dhapopogoth]] || [[word:dhapopogoj|dhapopogoj]] || [[word:dhapopogosh|dhapopogosh]] || [[word:dhapopogo|dhapopogo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:dhapogoth|dhapogoth]] || [[word:dhapogoj|dhapogoj]] || [[word:dhapogosh|dhapogosh]] || [[word:dhapogo|dhapogo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:dhapofgoth|dhapofgoth]] || [[word:dhapofgoj|dhapofgoj]] || [[word:dhapofgosh|dhapofgosh]] || [[word:dhapofgof|dhapofgof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:dhapogotho|dhapogotho]] || [[word:dhapogojo|dhapogojo]] || [[word:dhapogosho|dhapogosho]] || [[word:dhapogoko|dhapogoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:dhapogoth|dhapogoth]] || [[word:dhapogoj|dhapogoj]] || [[word:dhapogosh|dhapogosh]] || [[word:dhapogo|dhapogo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:dhapogothol|dhapogothol]] || [[word:dhapogojol|dhapogojol]] || [[word:dhapogoshol|dhapogoshol]] || [[word:dhapogokol|dhapogokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:dhapogothotho|dhapogothotho]] || [[word:dhapogojojo|dhapogojojo]] || [[word:dhapogoshosho|dhapogoshosho]] || [[word:dhapogoko|dhapogoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:dhapogothon|dhapogothon]] || [[word:dhapogojon|dhapogojon]] || [[word:dhapogoshon|dhapogoshon]] || [[word:dhapogokon|dhapogokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:dhapogothoro|dhapogothoro]] || [[word:dhapogojoro|dhapogojoro]] || [[word:dhapogoshoro|dhapogoshoro]] || [[word:dhapogokoro|dhapogokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|59e8839}}
